msg: warning: Variable j is a dead store!
reasoning: Line 20 is 'int i, j;'. Variable i is used as the for-loop counter (lines 21-34), but j is never assigned or read anywhere in add_dquot_ref() — a genuinely unused variable / dead store. The function has no #ifdef guard so the bug exists in all configurations; presence condition [True] is correctly constrained. The vbdb entry for d7e9711760a documents a double-lock deadlock bug (mutex locked at line 22 in the loop, then inode_get_rsv_space() called at line 29 under CONFIG_QUOTA_DEBUG also tries to lock the same mutex — deadlock under CONFIG_QUOTA_DEBUG). The unused j variable is a separate, new finding not documented in vbdb. New true positive.
